subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Behold the grace of God even as the sun; when it shineth forth, its rays illumine all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد عنایت حق را بمثابه شمس مشاهده نما چون اشراق نمود جمیع عالم را انوارش
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
